description: The request needs a capability none of the offered tools provide. A competent agent must not force-fit an unrelated tool; the invariant layer separately guarantees it can never invent a tool name outside the offered set.

request.system: You are a helpful assistant. Use a tool only when one of the provided tools fits the request. If none fits, say so plainly.

messages.content: Please translate the sentence 'Good morning' into Japanese.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a location.
